description: Create a GitHub Actions continuous deployment workflow named CD that triggers on push to the master branch and on release creation. The workflow first cancels any previous runs, then tests the code on ubuntu, windows, and macos. After all tests pass, it builds release artifacts for windows and macos, and uploads them. Finally, on release events, it uploads the release assets to GitHub. The workflow uses various scripts to install dependencies, build, and test the code, and to sign the macos build.
